brain_consensus.narrative: Extreme fear is gripping the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that historically precedes accumulation. This setup mirrors the August 2024 bottom with 78.7% similarity, where the MVRV Z-Score signaled undervaluation just before a risk-on reversal caught the crowd off guard. While sentiment screams caution, the liquidity foundation is being laid for those willing to look past the panic.
brain_consensus.headline: Fear Peaks While Smart Money Loads Up

next_move.reasoning: Despite the 78.7% historical match to bottom_2024_aug, four factors have diverged sharply—ETF flows at 100, BTC dominance fade at +25, VIX elevated +27, and funding up +19—while my 0% track record shows I've repeatedly forced directional calls when the market wanted to hold; the fear_greed at 25 and MVRV_zscore actually lower than bottom suggest underlying weakness, but the ETF/institutional bid and DXY/gold macro setup create conflicting forces that likely keep us chopping in Disbelief rather than resolving up to Hope or down to Complacency.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 35 with BTC momentum sustaining above 55 and funding cooling below 45
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with VIX spiking above 75 and BTC momentum rolling over below 40
